title: The Conquest of Ramhurmuz, al-Sus, and Tustar
description: According to al-Sari-Shu'ayb-Sayf-Muhammad, Talhah, alMuhallab and 'Amr: Meanwhile, Yazdajird never gave up rousing the people of Firs, regretting the fiascos for which they had been responsible. While he was in Marw, he wrote to them reminding them of the rancor he bore them and upbraiding them saying, "Have you resigned yourselves, people of Fars, to the fact that the Arabs have wrested from you the Sawid and the adjacent region and al-Ahwiz! However, they will not be…

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 13
